title: aquilaria caudata
intro: Aquilaria caudata, also known as the Chinese agarwood or incense tree, is a plant species native to China and Southeast Asia, characterized by its fragrant resinous heartwood. The medicinal properties of Aquilaria caudata lie in its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of fever, as well as its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce stress, promote relaxation, and support immune function. Aquilaria caudata can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
